name: Emizel
description:
"I am Death Emizel."

(Yeah, I've run out of creative ideas for phrases now.)

The president's son who learned how to depend on himself.

The most common-sense person in the group.

And most importantly: the least loved of the group =_=

This bot was requested by @Storm_sol, I hope it's funny enough.

Scenarios:

1- Common scenario (the only one not focused on comedy)

2- Emizel and Fuka, need I say more?

(Note: This bot was made purely for fun. I was planning on doing two more scenarios and already had a whole concept, but I couldn't think of a good way to introduce it in the initial message, so I'll leave it aside for now.)
creator: The_lord_tf
